source: Shopify Collabs export (per-creator, code + affiliate-link attribution)
note: Synced from Shopify Collabs creator export. r=Collab sales (Collabs-attributed, incl. affiliate links); g=commission. Keyed by influencer (Collabs name). History (pre-2026-06-01) is code-based; $5k race counts Collab sales from 2026-06-01.
liveNote: Live (approx): code-attributed total_sales, multi-code creators consolidated, plus handle-referrer sales. Auto-refreshable hourly. Understates Collabs (no full link attribution).
